settings.heading: SkinStylus™ Sterilock MicroSystem
settings.body: The only microneedling device with FDA clearance for both face an abdomen.

settings.heading: What is SkinStylus™ SteriLock®?
settings.body: The only microneedling device with FDA clearance for both the face and abdomen, SkinStylus SteriLock™ is a next-generation treatment designed with your safety and results in mind.
The only microneedling device with FDA clearance for treatments on both the face and abdomen.
With multiple cartridge options, your can adjust depth and approach to target fine lines, scars, or overall skin texture.
Built with a patented Seven-Step Safety System that prevents cross-contamination.
Unlike many other devices, SkinStylus can be fully sterilized.
Backed by a two-year warranty, making it one of the most reliable systems available today.

settings.title_1: The SteriLock's Microsystem's related accessories are intended to be used:
settings.description_1:
• Improve the appearance of surgical or traumatic hypertrophic scars on the abdomen in adults aged 22 or older*
  • Improve the appearance of facial acne scars in Fitzpatrick skin types I, II, and III in patients aged 22 years and older*

settings.title_1: Microneedling treatment creates microinjuries to the skin’s surface:
settings.description_1:
• Skin’s natural wound healing process stimulates collagen and elastin production

• Healed skin results in visible improvement and rejuvenation

• Minimally invasive, minimal downtime

• Safe for all skin tones*

settings.title: Do More with Microneedling with SkinStylus™
settings.description: Effective treatment for clients with scar and skin concerns
